spacing_and_layout.padding_philosophy: Generous Spacing: Containers must have p-6 or p-8. Use gap-6 or gap-8 in grids to let data breathe.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Total balance card should span col-span-full or md:col-span-2.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner data elements, rounded-full for interactive pills/buttons.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align numbers unless in tables. Keep currency formatting consistent.

components.cards: Clay & Crisp style: bg-white, 1px border border-[#E8EBE8], soft shadow-sm. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-md transition-all duration-300.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2C5530] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-[#214024] font-semibold. Secondary: bg-[#D48C70] text-white rounded-full hover:bg-[#BD7B60].
components.navigation: Sticky top nav or side nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-[#E8EBE8].
components.tables: Minimalist data-rich aesthetics. text-left, generous py-4 px-6 per cell, border-b border-[#E8EBE8]. Hover row bg-[#F5F7F5].
components.badges: Premium status: bg-[#2C5530]/10 text-[#2C5530] rounded-full px-3 py-1. Ordinary status: bg-[#5C665D]/10 text-[#5C665D] rounded-full px-3 py-1.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, standard sizing w-5 h-5. Use earthy tones matching the text context.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over images or buttons has contrast ratio > 4.5:1. Use Text Shadow on image overlays if text is white.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements and key text elements must have data-testid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and import 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text from Google Fonts.
The UI is a community savings platform. Avoid generic fintech blue. Use the provided Earthy/Organic Light theme (Deep Greens, Terracottas, Off-whites).
Format currency using 'UGX 52,000' with commas to denote thousands. Always use IBM Plex Sans for numbers so they align cleanly.
For the login/signup screens, use the `auth_background` image with a soft gradient overlay (bg-white/80 or bg-[#FAFAF8]/90) so form is perfectly readable.
In the dashboard, create a high-impact 'Total Group Balance' card using the primary green background (#2C5530) and white text to make it stand out.
For Member List, visually distinguish 'Premium' (UGX 52000/month) and 'Ordinary' members using colored badges.
Ensure the Super Admin view clearly highlights the destructive/sensitive actions (Delete User, Change Role) using the danger color (#D05A49) cautiously.
Ensure Shadcn/UI components (like Dialogs, Tables, Dropdowns) are styled to match the 'Clay & Crisp' 1px border aesthetic with soft rounded corners.
